expectations.evidence: 10 tools listed: notion_list_databases, notion_get_database_schema, notion_query_database, notion_get_page, notion_get_page_content, notion_search, notion_create_page, notion_update_page_properties, notion_append_block_children, notion_create_database_page
Stack section: TypeScript + MCP SDK + Zod validation
Phase 2: Each tool uses server.registerTool with Zod input schemas
Auth section: Bearer token via NOTION_API_KEY env var
readOnlyHint: true on read tools, annotations for write tools mentioned
